name: Macaroni & Cheese - Joanna's
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook macaroni according to package directions.
2. In a large saucepan, melt butter over medium heat. Add onion and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
3. Stir in flour, salt, dry mustard, pepper, and remaining salt. Gradually whisk in milk, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens and bubbles.
4. Reduce heat to low. Stir in cheese until melted and well combined.
5. Combine cooked macaroni with the cheese sauce and mix thoroughly.
6. Transfer the mixture into a buttered 12-inch square baking dish.
7. For topping: Tear the roll into small pieces, place them in a food processor, and pulse until fine bread crumbs form. In a separate pan, melt butter over low heat. Add the bread crumbs and toss to coat. Mix with additional shredded cheese.
8. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 20–25 minutes or until bubbly and golden.
9. Serve hot with sauteed Kielbasa.
